rulesIntro: Earn points with every activity and help your team reach the top of the leaderboard!
rulesUploadDescription: You can upload your activities via GPX files or import them directly from Strava. To import from Strava, you first need to link your Strava account on the profile page.
rulesPointsDescription: Points are calculated based on the type and distance of your activity:
rulesWalkHike: Walking or hiking: 1 point per km
rulesOther: All other activities (e.g. cycling): 1 point per 4 km (0.25 points/km)
rulesAthleteMultiplierDescription: For activities imported from Strava, the number of athletes participating in the activity multiplies the earned points. This means group activities are worth more!
rulesExampleDescription: 2 people cycling 8 km each would earn: 8 km × 0.25 × 2 athletes = 4 points each (8 points total for their team).
deleteAccountWarning: Deleting your account is irreversible. All your activities and data will be permanently removed.
deleteAccountConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.
